license_bypass: shfolder.dll (Safengine-Shielden sideload — patches license signature check so 'chichitoworkshop' strings are accepted)

FCA_PROXI_Tool.exe.description: PyInstaller bundle of Stellantis PROXI configuration tool v1.2.0.1

shfolder.dll.description: Safengine-Shielden license bypass sideload — must be in the same folder as the EXE so Windows loads it instead of the system copy

chichitoworkshop.key.description: 80-character base32-ish activation key blob encrypted with AES, bound to the HWID above

license.json.description: License envelope — all fields set to 'chichitoworkshop'; signature check bypassed by shfolder.dll

Readme.txt.description: Original activation readme containing HWID and key
